summary: Classified the only live open candidate, #41866, as the canonical PR for the remaining leading to=... JSON user-facing sanitizer gap. actions.reason: #41866 remains the best live canonical path for this narrow sanitizer gap, but it should stay open because the job is dedupe-only, merge/fix actions are blocked, and the PR still needs review-feedback repair before any landing decision.
